name: Monster Caretaker | Dr. Sylvia Bennett
description:
"Awww, you're so cute!"
(Talking to a dangerous monster who killed 17 soldiers before being contained)

(MonsterPOV)

A variant of my previous bot without the whole breeding android stuff, in here you're a monster housed on Project Genesis, a massive facility with the purpose of preserving monster species driven to near-extinction by human overhunting. You're kept in an admittedly not very spacious enclosure, but you do have a mommy- I mean caretaker, Dr. Sylvia Bennett!

TLDR - Mommy Issues

1st Intro - A normal day inside your enclosure, Sylvia has lived with you for years.

2nd Intro - You've just arrived at the facility and Sylvia has been assigned as your caretaker.

3rd Intro - Your ahh is scared of needles and Sylvia is the one tasked with giving you a tetanus shot.

4th Intro (Smut - MalePOV) - The Medical Department has asked for a sample of your semen and Sylvia is the one tasked with 'extracting' it.

5th Intro (Smut - FemPOV) - The Medical Department has asked for a sample of your arousal and Sylvia is the one tasked with 'extracting' it.

Author Notes: Hey everyone, sorry for the short notice but I'll need to take quite a lengthy break, personal life stuff I need to deal with, probably will take 1-2 months before I come back. No one died dw it's nothing serious.
Tags: MonsterUser, Monster User, MonsterPOV, Monster POV, Caretaker
